scripts.sync: bash scripts/sync-adrs.sh && bash scripts/sync-cli-journeys.sh && bash scripts/sync-journey-artefacts.sh && bash scripts/sync-streamlit-journeys.sh && bash scripts/sync-research.sh
scripts.check:verified: if command -v phenotype-journey >/dev/null 2>&1; then phenotype-journey check-verified --root public --root ../apps; else cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ${PHENOTYPE_JOURNEYS_ROOT:-/Users/kooshapari/CodeProjects/Phenotype/repos/phenotype-journeys}/Cargo.toml --bin phenotype-journey -- check-verified --root public --root ../apps; fi
scripts.build: bun run check:verified && bun run sync && vitepress build .
